title: Morning Coffee
content: Sarah drinks coffee every morning before work. She likes it hot and strong. Sometimes she reads the news while drinking it.

title: At the Supermarket
content: Tom goes to the supermarket every Saturday. He buys fruits, vegetables, milk, and bread. Today he also buys chocolate.

title: Rainy Day
content: It is raining outside. Anna stays home and watches a movie. She also makes tea and listens to music.
